title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight，the main contract closed 766.5，an increase of 1.32% throughout the day. some traders were active to sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 820-830 yuan/mt; increased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
